free_text: Four high-purity Ge detectors (7.6 cm diam.,
7.6 cm long) with relative efficiencies of 100% at 90
and 127 deg (two of them at both angles) and shielded
On. Data received from Miriam Muescher.
Jpi=1+ taken from K.Kitao et al (2002)
Jpi=(1-) taken from K.Kitao et al (2002)
J=(1,2) taken from K.Kitao et al (2002)
Jpi=1+ or 2+ taken from K.Kitao et al (2002)
Jpi=1- taken from K.Kitao et al (2002)
Jpi assignments of low levels given
and scaling of the product of photon flux and
a systematic uncertainty of 10% assumed for
the photon flux and efficiency determination and the
number of target nuclei (not included in table)
Dividing deduced elastic scattering cross section by
the ground-state gamma-decay branching ratio to
